meaning: n.萨能奶山羊(产于瑞士萨能山谷的毛乳用山羊)
examples: The performance of Saanen dairy goat has been analysed statistically.
In this study, IGFBP3 gene in Xinong Saanen dairy goat was cloned and sequenced in first time.
The secondary oocytes from Saanen dairy goats and 4-32 cell embryos from Shaanbei black goats were used as cytoplast donors and karyoplast donors respectively.
